question: Will Moody's Seasoned Baa Corporate Bond Yield have increased by 2026-06-28 as compared to its value on 2026-06-21? Resolution criteria: Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/DBAA once the data is published. Background: The notes from the release: N/A.
